description_long: This is a pair of open-toe sandals featuring a minimalist design with wide, overlapping leather straps across the front and a single strap securing the heel. The sandals are a warm tan color, with visible stitching along the edge of the sole, suggesting a handcrafted or artisanal construction. The footbed appears flat and lightly contoured, with a smooth finish and no visible arch support. The ankle strap is fastened with a small metallic buckle, adding both function and a subtle decorative element. The sole is thin and likely made of a flexible material, suitable for casual urban walking. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and versatile, ideal for warm weather in city environments.
description: A pair of tan open-toe sandals with wide leather straps, a flat sole, and a buckle-fastened ankle strap, designed for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the overlapping wide straps and open-toe design, with both sandals angled slightly outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat sole, the full length of the straps, and the ankle buckle detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel straps and buckles, as well as the back of the footbed.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the arrangement of the straps and the thinness of the sole.
